name: TouchBistro Restaurant POS and Management API
what_it_does: TouchBistro restaurant management and POS REST API for full-service, quick-service, and multi-location restaurant operations. Enables AI agents to manage menu creation and item pricing for restaurant menu management automation, handle table management and floor plan for front-of-house operations automation, access order management and kitchen display for restaurant order workflow automation, retrieve sales reporting and revenue analytics for restaurant performance automation, manage staff scheduling and labor cost tracking for restaurant workforce automation, handle inventory tracking and waste management for food cost automation, access customer loyalty and gift card management for restaurant marketing automation, retrieve reservation and waitlist integration for guest management automation, manage franchise and multi-location reporting for restaurant group analytics automation, and integrate TouchBistro with delivery platforms (DoorDash, Uber Eats), accounting (QuickBooks, Xero), and payroll for end-to-end restaurant business management.
use_cases: Managing menus from restaurant operations automation agents
Reporting sales from restaurant analytics agents
Tracking inventory from food cost management agents
Integrating delivery from third-party platform agents
not_for: Large enterprise restaurant chain ERP (use Oracle MICROS or Revel)
best_when: A full-service restaurant, quick-service restaurant, bar, or food service business wanting AI agents to automate menu management, sales reporting, inventory tracking, and third-party delivery integration within TouchBistro's restaurant management platform.
avoid_when: TIP POOLING LABOR LAW COMPLIANCE FOR AUTOMATED GRATUITY: Automated tip pooling and distribution via TouchBistro must comply with FLSA tip pooling rules and applicable state tip credit laws; automated tip distribution including kitchen staff or managers without FLSA compliance review creates wage theft claim exposure. LIQUOR SALES AGE VERIFICATION FOR AUTOMATED TABLE SERVICE: Automated drink ordering workflow via TouchBistro must preserve age verification prompt in server workflow; automated order completion that bypasses age verification for alcohol items creates liquor license violation. DELIVERY PLATFORM MENU SYNC ACCURACY: Automated menu syndication via TouchBistro to third-party delivery platforms (DoorDash, Uber Eats) must maintain price and availability accuracy; automated out-of-stock items on delivery platforms without menu sync creates order fulfillment failure and customer refund.

auth.notes: TouchBistro uses OAuth 2.0 and API key authentication. REST API with JSON. Toronto, Ontario Canada HQ. Founded 2010 by Alex Barrotti. Private ($350M+ raised, JPMorgan Chase Strategic Investments, RBC, Fairfax Financial). 29,000+ restaurant locations globally. iPad-based POS for restaurants. Full-service, QSR, bar, nightclub support. Integrated reservation (through TouchBistro Reservations), online ordering, delivery, loyalty, and marketing. Competes with Toast, Square for Restaurants, and Lightspeed Restaurant for restaurant POS.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual subscription per location
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription per restaurant location; module pricing for reservations, loyalty, online ordering, and marketing automation; hardware bundle options
pricing.notes: Toronto CA. Private ($350M+ raised). Founded 2010. 29,000+ locations. Annual subscription per location. Module pricing for add-ons. iPad hardware included in bundle options.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; sales and menu queries throttled; webhooks for order and payment events

known_agent_gotchas: DELIVERY PLATFORM MENU SYNC REAL-TIME ACCURACY: Automated menu syndication to DoorDash, Uber Eats, and other delivery platforms via TouchBistro must maintain real-time availability status; 86'd items (out of stock) must propagate to delivery platforms within minutes; automated menu without real-time availability sync creates delivery platform order rejection and customer refund

TIP POOLING FLSA STATE LAW COMPLIANCE: Automated tip pooling and distribution via TouchBistro must apply FLSA tip pooling rules and state-specific tip credit laws; some states prohibit tip pooling with kitchen staff or have higher tip credit requirements; automated tip distribution without state law validation creates wage claim exposure

OFFLINE MODE DATA RECONCILIATION: TouchBistro iPad POS operates in offline mode during internet outage; automated backend order and sales sync must reconcile offline transaction data after connectivity restore; automated reporting using only online transaction data misses offline sales for cash-heavy restaurants

ALCOHOL SALES AGE VERIFICATION WORKFLOW PRESERVATION: Automated order completion workflow must preserve age verification prompt for alcoholic beverage items; automated order acceptance that bypasses age verification check for alcohol creates liquor license violation and dramshop liability

MULTI-LOCATION REPORTING CONSOLIDATION: TouchBistro multi-location restaurant groups have location-specific API credentials; automated consolidated reporting requires aggregation across location-specific API responses; no single multi-location API endpoint returns consolidated group data in all cases

ACCOUNTING INTEGRATION SYNC LATENCY: TouchBistro QuickBooks and Xero integration syncs daily sales data; automated accounting reconciliation must account for end-of-day sync completion before financial reporting; real-time accounting sync is not available
agent_readiness.security_notes: Restaurant POS. PCI-DSS, SOC2. OAuth2. US/CA. Transaction data, customer payment, and restaurant operations.

security_score_components.security_notes: Restaurant POS. PCI-DSS, SOC2. OAuth2. US/CA. Payment card and restaurant transaction data.
